title: result.published event payload (v1)
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 20.10's result subset. Produced by epd2_tally_service.events.result_publication_state_payload, used by build_result_published_event (result.published). Per ADR-009 item 15, every field here is already part of the minimum-disclosure set (aggregate counts plus administrative fields) - there is no narrower 'public' subset to additionally redact. additionalProperties: false is a load-bearing identity-separation control: account_id, person_id, and identity_record_id are all forbidden and cannot appear on a payload that validates against this schema.
